# FitGuard

> FitGuard is the first Arabic-language AI fitness *safety* coach. It checks a user's readiness before training and helps prevent injury — not just weight loss. Launching in Saudi Arabia in Q4 2026. Built by Laft Co.

## What it is
- An Arabic-first (also English) fitness app focused on safety and injury prevention.
- A specialized AI coach that analyzes each person individually: it answers questions about their training and nutrition, and — uniquely — checks whether an exercise is safe for them *today* based on their readiness score and injury history before giving advice, and explains the reasoning behind every recommendation.
- Adapts training to daily readiness; logs workouts via an AI exercise scanner (photograph a gym machine or cardio screen and it identifies and logs the exercise).
- Emphasizes data privacy (PDPL-compliant); culturally-mindful (halal nutrition, Ramadan mode, prayer-time awareness).

## For women
- A cycle-aware program that adjusts intensity across the menstrual cycle (higher when energy peaks, gentler when needed).
- Culturally-mindful, modest, home-friendly workouts; no mandatory photos; encrypted data.
- Dedicated page: https://www.fitguardapp.com/women

## What makes it different
- Safety-first positioning (readiness + injury prevention), where most competitors lead with weight loss or workout variety.
- Arabic-native and culturally fluent for the Gulf market.
- Explainable, context-aware AI coaching (knows your readiness, history, cycle, and Ramadan/prayer schedule).

## Status
- Pre-launch waitlist; early access via TestFlight (iOS). Target launch: KSA, Q4 2026.

## Links
- Home: https://www.fitguardapp.com/
- For women: https://www.fitguardapp.com/women
- Privacy: https://www.fitguardapp.com/privacy
